info.title: RE-WILD API
info.description: Mycelium — offline-first sync backend for RE-WILD

post.description: Creates a new user account and returns a JWT access token
Authenticates with email and password and returns a JWT access token
Issues a new access token using the refresh token cookie
Revokes the refresh token and clears the auth cookie
Sends a password reset email if the address is registered. Always returns 200 to prevent account enumeration.
Resets the user's password using a valid time-limited token and signs them in

get.description: Returns all projects for the authenticated user

put.description: Upserts a project by ID. Path ID takes precedence over any ID in the request body.

delete.description: Deletes a project and cascades to its associated levels

get.description: Returns all levels for the authenticated user

put.description: Upserts a level by ID. Path ID takes precedence over any ID in the request body.

post.description: Bidirectional sync: push dirty local records and pull server-side changes since lastSyncedAt

get.description: Returns all confirmed assets for the authenticated user

post.description: Validates level ownership and returns a presigned PUT URL for direct upload to object storage
Marks an asset as confirmed after successful direct upload. Purges stale unconfirmed records older than 1 hour.
